description:
Legal record (#39) in a court register/pinqas from a Rabbanite beit din in Cairo (on f. 9v of BL OR 6356). In Hebrew. Location: Cairo. Dated 26 Nisan 5443 AM, which is 1683 CE. 

(Document #39) Deed of testimony in which ʿAmram Shirāb grants power of attorney to David Abu-Sayf(?) (אבו שייף). ʿAmram empowers David to appear on his behalf for a settling of accounts with a certain Daniel ha-Levi aka גוזייאל/עזייאל(?). The latter man is listed as a resident of Damietta, so this may be the intended location for the pending account settlement. MCD.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית. מוחזק בהספרייה הבריטית.
